seo.title: Community Welcome Center
seo.description: A sample community website built with Community Site Engine.

blocks.title: A welcoming hub for neighbors, volunteers, and local stories
blocks.body: This sample site shows how a community organization can share events, news, projects, and resources in multiple languages.

image.alt: Neighbors meeting in a community hall
image.caption: A welcoming community gathering
image.description: Illustration of neighbors sharing ideas in a bright community room.

blocks.title: What this sample includes
blocks.intro: Use these pages as a starting point, then replace them with your real content.

cards.title: Events
cards.body: Publish upcoming gatherings, workshops, and volunteer days.

cards.title: News & Articles
cards.body: Share updates, announcements, and community stories.

cards.title: Gallery
cards.body: Highlight images from programs and celebrations.

blocks.title: Upcoming Events
blocks.intro: Sample events are included so the calendar and event list have content to display.

blocks.title: Make this site your own
blocks.body: Edit pages, menus, events, articles, gallery items, and styles from the admin app.
